subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted toward the Kingdom! Be thou not unhappy; the tempest of sorrow shall pass; regret will not last; disappointment will vanish
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب ملکوت محزون مباش طوفان غم ساکن گردد حسرت نماند حرمان نپاید آتش محبت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
